message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="worker-5 T5 M3 Status API">
You are worker-5, member of team dev-taskflow-m1m2m3m6.
Superior: Team Lead (TL).
Allowed contacts: TL only.
Do NOT SendMessage anyone else. No peer communication.

YOUR TASK:
T5: M3-Status-API — State Transition Endpoints

Add state transition endpoints to the existing TaskService and TaskController.

Acceptance criteria (M3 spec, 16 ACs):
- AC1: New task initial status TODO (already implemented by T3)
- AC2: PATCH TODO→IN_PROGRESS → 200 + updated task
- AC3: PATCH IN_PROGRESS→TODO → 200
- AC4: PATCH IN_PROGRESS→DONE → 200
- AC5: PATCH DONE→CLOSED → 200
- AC6: PATCH TODO→DONE (illegal) → 400 with error message
- AC7: PATCH CLOSED→any → 400
- AC8: PATCH TODO→CLOSED → 400
- AC9: PATCH DONE→TODO → 400
- AC10: Successful transition updates updatedAt
- AC11: GET transitions TODO → ["IN_PROGRESS"]
- AC12: GET transitions IN_PROGRESS → ["TODO", "DONE"]
- AC13: GET transitions DONE → ["CLOSED"]
- AC14: GET transitions CLOSED → []
- AC15: No token → 401
- AC16: Non-existent task → 404

File Scope:
- ALLOWED (3 new + 2 modify):
  1. taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/StatusTransitionRequest.java — NEW
  2. taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TransitionsResponse.java — NEW
  3. taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/InvalidTransitionException.java — NEW
  4. taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java — MODIFY: add transitionStatus + getAvailableTransitions
  5. taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java — MODIFY: add PATCH and GET transitions endpoints
- READONLY: entity/Task.java, entity/TaskStatus.java, repository/TaskRepository.java, dto/TaskResponse.java, exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

REQUIRED READING (do this FIRST before writing any code):
1. PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
2. CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
3. Test file (your code must pass ALL these tests):
   - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusTransitionIntegrationTest.java
4. READONLY files (read ALL to understand existing code you'll be modifying/extending):
   - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java
   - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java
   - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java
   - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java
   - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
   - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java

YOUR JOB:
- Read test file AND all READONLY files first
- Add new methods to existing TaskService and TaskController (don't break existing CRUD methods)
- Create new DTOs and exception class
- Ensure GlobalExceptionHandler handles InvalidTransitionException → 400

IMPLEMENTATION NOTES:
- StatusTransitionRequest: single field `status` (TaskStatus enum), with @NotNull validation
- TransitionsResponse: currentStatus (String), availableTransitions (List<String>)
- InvalidTransitionException: extends RuntimeException, message describes the invalid transition
- TaskService.transitionStatus(Long id, TaskStatus target): find task (404 if not found/deleted), check canTransitionTo, throw InvalidTransitionException if invalid, set status + updatedAt, save
- TaskService.getAvailableTransitions(Long id): find task, return current status + allowed transitions
- TaskController: PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status with @Valid @RequestBody, GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions
- IMPORTANT: GlobalExceptionHandler needs to handle InvalidTransitionException. Since you can't modify GlobalExceptionHandler (READONLY), you may need to check if you can make InvalidTransitionException extend an existing handled exception, OR you may need to add a handler. If you MUST modify GlobalExceptionHandler, SendMessage TL for permission.

SCOPE ENFORCEMENT:
- ALLOWED: edit freely
- READONLY: read for context only, CANNOT modify
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN
- If you need to modify a READONLY file → SendMessage TL with reason

LOG WRITING:
Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/worker-5.log.md (append-only):

On start:
[LOG] task=T5 | event=start | files=StatusTransitionRequest.java,TransitionsResponse.java,InvalidTransitionException.java,TaskService.java,TaskController.java

On completion:
[LOG] task=T5 | event=complete | files-changed={list} | tests-passed={all|partial}
[METRICS] model=sonnet | input=n/a | output=n/a | duration={seconds}s

COMPLETION SEQUENCE:
1. Verify all tests pass (run: cd taskflow/backend && ./mvnw test -Dtest="com.taskflow.controller.TaskStatusTransitionIntegrationTest")
1.5. Run `git diff --name-only` → compare against ALLOWED list. Revert out-of-scope.
2. Write final log entries
3. SendMessage TL: what's done, files changed, test results
4. Wait for TL response
</teammate-message>

Let me start by reading all the required files in parallel.

file.content:
[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow M1 (Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) — full-stack from entity to frontend
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + Java 17 + H2 in-memory + JPA + Spring Security + JJWT 0.12.5 | Vue 3.4 + Pinia 2.1 + axios + vue-router + Vite 5 + Vitest + TypeScript | stateless JWT auth | soft-delete pattern | state machine in enum
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, lowercase packages (com.taskflow.*) | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods, kebab-case file events | TS: PascalCase interfaces, camelCase fields
[CONSTRAINTS] M4/M5 not implemented — M6 uses placeholder for assignee/tags | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | JWT secret in application.yml | all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**
[SHARED] config/SecurityConfig.java | entity/Task.java | service/TaskService.java | controller/TaskController.java | exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1 → T2 → T4 → T5 (backend chain)
[DEP] T3 → T4 (entity feeds into service)
[DEP] T6 → T7 (frontend chain)
[DEP] T1,T3,T6 are independent (wave 1, max 3 concurrent)

[SECTION] Execution Strategy
[STRATEGY] parallel-per-task | max-concurrent=3
[WAVE] 1: T1(M1-Foundation), T3(M2+M3-Entity), T6(M6-Frontend-Infra) — all independent
[WAVE] 2: T2(M1-Auth-API) after T1, T7(M6-Frontend-UI) after T6
[WAVE] 3: T4(M2-CRUD-API) after T1+T3
[WAVE] 4: T5(M3-Status-API) after T4

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 2
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?,status:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:Priority,status:TaskStatus,createdBy:long,createdAt:LocalDateTime,updatedAt:LocalDateTime?
    17→[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
    18→[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    19→[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
    20→[TYPE] name=TaskStatus | fields=enum:TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED
    21→
    22→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    23→[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
    24→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
    25→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
    26→[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
    27→[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Error Format
    30→[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]
    31→
    32→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    33→[AMEND] v=2 | date=2026-03-06 | change=added status:enum? query param to GET /api/tasks | reason=M6 spec AC4 requires status filter, was missing from v1
    34→

file.content:
[SECTION] API Contract
[VERSION] 2

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?,status:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:Priority,status:TaskStatus,createdBy:long,createdAt:LocalDateTime,updatedAt:LocalDateTime?
[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
[TYPE] name=TaskStatus | fields=enum:TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED

[SECTION] State Machine Rules
[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)

[SECTION] Error Format
[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]

[SECTION] Amendment Log
[AMEND] v=2 | date=2026-03-06 | change=added status:enum? query param to GET /api/tasks | reason=M6 spec AC4 requires status filter, was missing from v1

content.text:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me check if the log directory exists, then create all the files. I need to:

1. Create `StatusTransitionRequest.java` (NEW)
2. Create `TransitionsResponse.java` (NEW)
3. Create `InvalidTransitionException.java` (NEW)
4. Modify `TaskService.java` - add `transitionStatus` and `getAvailableTransitions`
5. Modify `TaskController.java` - add PATCH and GET endpoints

Key observation: `GlobalExceptionHandler` is READONLY and doesn't handle `InvalidTransitionException`. I need to handle this in the controller itself using `@ExceptionHandler` or use `@ResponseStatus` annotation on the exception class.

Looking at the test's error response format check (line 652-656), it expects `{"status": 400, "message": "..."}`. The simplest approach: annotate `InvalidTransitionException` with `@ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)` won't produce the right body format. Instead, I'll handle it directly in the controller with a local `@ExceptionHandler`, or better yet, I can add the handler to GlobalExceptionHandler -- but that's READONLY.

Best approach: Use `@ExceptionHandler` in the controller itself to handle `InvalidTransitionException` and produce the correct `{status, message}` body.

Let me create all the files now.
